case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS-CAL/OSHA VS. UNITED PARCEL SERVICE DBA UPS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS-CAL/OSHA CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE DBA UPS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.41 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,275.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS-CAL/OSHA CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE DBA UPS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
